_comment: Manual contract overrides. Keys are NHL player_id (string). These ALWAYS win over the database.
_comment2: Only store permanent facts: cap_hit, length_of_contract, expiry_year, expiry_status. years_left and year_of_contract are computed dynamically from expiry_year and the current season — do NOT hardcode them here.

8478550._note: Panarin — traded to LAK Feb 2026, new 2yr $11M AAV extension through 2027-28

8480012._note: Elias Pettersson (C, born 1998) — 8yr $11.6M deal 2023-24 through 2030-31; slug collision with D-Pettersson (born 2004)

8482175._note: JJ Peterka — NHL API first name is 'JJ' (legal: John-Jason), slug jj-peterka -> 404; correct slug john-jason-peterka confirmed $7.7M 5yr UFA 2030

8477960._note: Kempe current bridge deal $5.5M/yr — scraper grabbed his 2026-27 extension instead

8482730._note: Clarke — puckpedia sidebar pp-ufa widget triggered UFA; he is RFA on expiry

8484801._note: Celebrini — same sidebar pp-ufa issue; he is RFA on expiry
